cells.rationale: Well-specified schema cutover across two reader seams with named refs, but contract-shaped (PanelSelections schema) so the frontier GPT workhorse at xhigh fits the propagation risk without a nameable opus reason.
Substantial but fully-specified work: land a byte-verbatim roster and mirror an existing structural-gate precedent with enumerated failure classes, so a strong GPT at the default band suffices.
Small, scripted vendor-sync pipeline with a precondition check and golden re-record; bounded mechanical work with light judgment routes to the strong GPT light tier at medium.
Authoring slash-only skill prose with description discipline, near-uniform wording, and honest caveats is judgment- and taste-heavy Claude-tuned work, bounded by a clear model-guidance precedent.
Broad forward-facing docs and glossary sweep with prune-first CLAUDE.md discipline and in-repo idiom matching is user-facing wording work that favors the sonnet workhorse across many surfaces.
